description_long: This object is a collection of various road traffic signs, each mounted on a slender vertical metal post. The signs feature a range of shapes including circular, rectangular, and triangular, with distinct color schemes such as red, blue, green, and white, indicating different types of road instructions and regulations. The signs display a mix of symbols, pictograms, and numbers, such as speed limits, directional arrows, and exit indicators, all commonly found in urban and suburban environments. The posts are uniformly metallic and appear to be galvanized for weather resistance, with the signs themselves likely made from reflective metal or plastic for visibility. The arrangement suggests a set intended for modular placement along roadsides, intersections, or parking areas. The overall construction is robust, designed to withstand outdoor conditions and provide clear visual communication to drivers and pedestrians.
description: A grouped set of road traffic signs on metal posts, featuring various shapes, colors, and symbols for urban roadside use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the faces of all traffic signs, clearly displaying their symbols, colors, and text.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the signs and the alignment of the posts, with minimal visibility of sign faces.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the backs of the signs and posts, with no visible symbols or text.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, highlighting the posts and the edge profiles of the signs.
attribute_symbol_or_pictogram: Speed limit numbers, directional arrows, exit symbols, parking icons, and other standard road sign pictograms.
attribute_location_context: urban roadside, intersections, parking lot entrances, highway exits
